productDisplayName: Puma Women USP Chest Cat Fuchsia T-shirt
description: CompositionFuschia round neck t-shirt with short sleeves, made of 65% polyester and 35% cotton, brand logo printed ont the left chest and the nape of the neck, and engineered with USP moisture management technologyFittingRegularWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm water at 40 degreesDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool ironDo not dry cleanDo not iron directly on print/trims/ logoSimplicity meets style in this fuschia t-shirt from puma. The colour is strikingly awesome, and subtle branding is done through the jumping cat logo on the chest. Engineered with USP moisture management technology, the tee absorbs sweat to keep you dry and comfortable at all times. Wear it to the gym, for running, jogging, cycling and other Sports activities, apart from using it as casual wear. Team it with jeans, shorts or tracks and get going!Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
